text_variants.text: You did not sleep on the Enchanted Ground — and only the awake can recognize this shore. The river is behind you now.
text_variants.text_zh: 你在魔境没有沉睡——唯有醒着的人，才认得出此岸。那河，如今已在你身后。

text_variants.text: Not even these dark waters could close over one who stood firm before Apollyon. The river is behind you.
text_variants.text_zh: 连这幽暗的河水，也没能淹过曾在亚玻伦面前站立的人。那河，已在你身后。

text_variants.text: We have crossed — together, just as I promised at the Fair. I told you I would remember aloud what we had seen; I never had to. You kept walking.
text_variants.text_zh: 我们渡过来了——一同渡过，正如我在集市答应你的。我说过会大声替你记起我们见过的一切；可我从没用上。你一直在走。

gate.speaker: Shining One
gate.text: What was promised is now before you.
gate.text_zh: 所应许的，如今就在你眼前。

text_variants.text: The burden you carried out of the City fell at the Cross; now even the river of death is behind you. What was promised is now before you.
text_variants.text_zh: 你从那城背出来的重担，已在十字架前滚落；如今连那死亡之河也已过去。所应许的，就在你眼前。
